summary.intent: Fix GitHub issue #658 in the moltis repo: an agent runner enters a 25-iteration dead loop when the LLM repeatedly calls a tool with empty/invalid arguments, wasting iterations and never recovering.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented and committed the fix: a new tool argument validator (Fix B), a loop detector with two-stage intervention (Fixes A/C), diagnostic event reordering (Fix D), config knobs, integration tests, and format/lint clean.

repo: The runner has two separate dispatch paths — non-streaming (L895–L1460) and streaming (L1546–L1860) — that required parallel, symmetric changes for every fix.
Tool result tuples used a 3-element shape (success, result_json, error_msg); adding a 4th 'rejected' bool required updating all return sites in both paths.
RunnerEvent enum is consumed by the chat crate (crates/chat/src/lib.rs) which had an exhaustive match; adding new variants required updating that file too.
The AgentTool trait already exposes parameters_schema() in crates/agents/src/tool_registry.rs:15 — no trait change needed for validation.

Config fields for tools are gated under a [tools] section in crates/config/src/schema.rs and must also have entries added to crates/config/src/validate.rs build_schema_map and crates/config/src/template.rs.
CLAUDE.md convention: conventional commit format, no changelog entry, nightly-2025-11-30 toolchain for fmt.
The bd (beads) issue tracker was offline in the evergreen-paper worktree; the commit proceeded without filing an issue.

code.finding: Non-streaming tool dispatch path — tool futures are spawned here, results processed in a separate loop; both sections needed validation + fingerprint recording.
Streaming tool dispatch path — mirrors the non-streaming path structurally but finalizes args from a stream accumulator; debug log added at finalize step (Fix D).
ToolCallStart event was emitted before execution — moved to after schema validation passes so rejected calls never show 'Executing…' in the UI.
Existing mock tools and test harness pattern; new FailingExecTool and reflex-loop integration tests added here.
New module: minimal required-field + primitive-type validator (not a full JSON-Schema evaluator); skips tools with empty or no-required schema.
New module: ring buffer of ToolCallFingerprint (tool_name, args_hash, error_hash); two-stage intervention — nudge message then tool stripping.
Exhaustive match on RunnerEvent required adding ToolCallRejected and LoopInterventionFired variants.
Two new fields added: agent_loop_detector_window (default 3, 0 disables) and agent_loop_detector_strip_tools_on_second_fire (default true).

workflow: Running `cargo check -p agents` first to isolate compile errors before a full workspace build saves significant iteration time.
Running per-module unit tests (tool_arg_validator, tool_loop_detector) before runner integration tests catches logic bugs earlier.
taplo TOML formatter had pre-existing failures on files not touched — safe to ignore as long as only diff-owned files are clean.
CUDA toolkit absence causes providers-lib lint/test to fail regardless of changes — skip that crate when running workspace-wide checks.

friction: The 4-tuple refactor (adding 'rejected' bool) required touching many return sites across both dispatch paths — discovered only mid-implementation after the 3-tuple shape was already wired in.
The chat crate's exhaustive RunnerEvent match was a silent blocker caught only at workspace build time, not during the per-crate agents build.
bd (beads) issue tracker was offline in the worktree; could not file the tracking issue as planned.
Rate limit hit mid-session ('You've hit your limit · resets 8pm'), interrupting work between the test run and the template.rs update.
CUDA toolkit absence produced spurious lint/build failures across the workspace, requiring manual crate exclusion to get a clean signal.
open_items: Streaming-path integration tests (mirror of non-streaming reflex-loop tests via run_agent_loop_streaming) were planned but not confirmed added.
Beads issue for #658 was never filed due to offline bd database — should be filed when the worktree db is back online.
Full JSON-Schema validation (beyond required-field + primitive-type checks) was deliberately deferred; noted as a future upgrade path in tool_arg_validator.
Pre-existing taplo TOML formatting failures in unrelated files were not fixed — flagged but deferred.
ToolCallRejected event handling in the web UI (crates/web/src/assets/chat.js activity-log) was noted as needing a quick check but not confirmed done.
